notice: Cloudflare static mode: public forum posts require a backend binding. Until a Cloudflare Worker/KV backend is connected, the board displays seed notices and stores new posts on the reader device.

posts.name: Matrix Reprogrammed
posts.title: Cloudflare Static Forum Mode
posts.body: The Signal Board is readable on Cloudflare. Posting uses local device storage until a Cloudflare Worker/KV backend is connected. Source drops can still be copied and sent through the contact or email route.
